title: Quicreate Skyblock
description: Speedrun oriented Create tech progression Skyblock with magnetic power, nuclear heat, and post game spacer tech from other worlds, made from the local Bosses!
body:
A skyblock factory progression pack based primarily around an expanded "Create: New Age" and a few other Addons! This takes you through ages tech, with several extra tiers of more advanced technology which requires space travel to other planets, and some of which will require defeating powerful bosses that can be found on these outer worlds!

The intention is, if you rush and have a plan, you can defeat the ender dragon within 5 hours to "win", or just start jumping to farther planets and defeat stronger bosses instead to move straight to hard mode for end game items! No speedrun estimate yet for reaching the Final Tiers. Blind playthrough to beat dragon is estimated at 10 hours if you brute force and don't automate anything.
[The End Portal is on the Moon]

![Glacio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vTc9nNBl/images/d5921334ee20a81fb7e9a6b0fe2c263c9a360926.png)

The fully playable experience is available in this release, it only lacks the quest tree as I'm still trying to find a good workflow for the Heracles Quest Mod.

There are preset gamerules to remove some normal skyblock friction I got tired of after 10 years, if you want to lose your items when you fall you just need to set the gamerules after starting the world and it should keep your new preset.

Primary Mods
- Quicreate - (By Me)
- Create - (By Simibubi and Team)
- Create Mechanical Extruder + Create Sifter (By Oierbravo)
- Create Utilities - (By Duqueeee)
- *Create: New Age - (By NullBlade)
- *Cataclysm - (Famously By Mcl_ender)
- *Ad Astra - (By Terrarium Team)

*Major Inspiration Mods

Other Included Mods
